name: Infernal Coaxing
outcome: While whispering sweet, seductive affirmations, Ceris lovingly strokes the back of your head with a powerful claw, and you eagerly lick and suck on her pert nipple, drawing out gush after gush of creamy milk to gulp down, filling your head with a hot needy haze.
miss: While whispering sweet, seductive affirmations, Ceris lovingly strokes the back of your head with a powerful claw, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to endure the temptation and not drink down any milk!
statusOutcome: The effects of the comfortingly warm cream slowly fills every bit of [TargetName]'s body with pulsing, needy sexual desire, coaxing you to drink even more.
